decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with Birthing Ritual and utilizing it to play out a variety of powerful creatures and disruptive spells. By generating a large amount of mana early on, the deck can overwhelm opponents with a combination of aggressive threats like Shardless Agent and Harbinger of the Seas, while also disrupting their game plan with cards like Force of Negation and Sink into Stupor. The deck aims to close out games quickly by overwhelming opponents with a mix of creatures and spells.

The deck focuses on utilizing Indomitable Creativity to combo with Fable of the Mirror-Breaker and Leyline Binding to cheat out powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Valgavoth, Terror Eater. The deck includes additional control elements like Teferi, Time Raveler, Prismatic Ending, and Spell Snare to disrupt the opponent's game plan. It also includes card draw and recursion with Wrenn and Six, as well as utility lands like Dwarven Mine and Thundering Falls. The deck's strategy involves creativity and surprises to overwhelm opponents with unexpected plays.

The focus of this Dimir Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card advantage. The deck uses cards like Counterspell, Force of Negation, and Spell Snare to control the board while utilizing cards like Cling to Dust and Consult the Star Charts for card advantage. The creatures in the deck, such as Wan Shi Tong, Librarian and Orcish Bowmasters, provide additional control elements and threats. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outpace the opponent through careful resource management and efficient control spells.

This deck aims to quickly overwhelm opponents with aggressive creatures while disrupting their strategies with taxing effects. The deck utilizes a mix of powerful creatures like Phelia and Phlage, along with spells like Solitude and Galvanic Discharge to control the board. The inclusion of cards like Consign to Memory and Surgical Extraction provide additional disruption and removal options. The mana base includes a mix of fetch lands and dual lands to ensure consistent mana production for both white and red spells.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly reduce your own life total to enable powerful synergies with Death's Shadow, Nethergoyf, and Moonshadow. The deck utilizes a combination of discard spells, removal, and efficient creatures to apply early pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan. With the ability to consistently lower your own life total while controlling the board, this deck aims to win the game through aggression and resource denial before the opponent can establish their own strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to assemble a powerful combo without relying on lands. By utilizing cards like Lotus Bloom, Thundertrap Trainer, and Hydroelectric Specimen, the deck aims to create a winning board state through various synergies and interactions. Cards like Disrupting Shoal and Flare of Denial help to control the game and protect the combo, while Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Whir of Invention provide card advantage and search for key pieces. The inclusion of cards like Sea Gate Restoration and Sink into Stupor provide additional utility and disruption against the opponent.

The focus of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures and then cast Living End to bring them all back onto the battlefield. The deck includes various ways to cycle and discard creatures to set up for a powerful Living End play, while also including disruptive cards like Force of Negation and Endurance to control the game until the combo can be executed. The deck also includes creatures with power and toughness modifiers to create a strong board presence after resolving Living End.

This deck focuses on utilizing cards that allow the player to quickly fill up their graveyard with powerful creatures, such as Psychic Frog and Emperor of Bones. By using cards like Faithless Looting and Thought Scour, the player can efficiently get their combo pieces into the graveyard. Once the graveyard is full, the player can use reanimation spells like Unearth and Persist to bring back powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty. The deck also includes disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to help control the game and protect the combo.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly and efficiently through cards like Arboreal Grazer, Amulet of Vigor, and Lotus Field. It aims to cast Primeval Titan and search for lands like Simic Growth Chamber and Vesuva to generate more mana and gain advantages. By utilizing cards like Urza's Saga and Gruul Turf, the deck can set up explosive plays with cards such as Scapeshift and Cultivator Colossus to either overwhelm the opponent or search for specific combo pieces to win the game. Malevolent Rumble and Aftermath Analyst provide control and disruption to further solidify the deck's strategy.

This aggro deck utilizes a combination of efficient creatures and disruptive spells to pressure opponents while taxing their resources. With a focus on playing threats early and disrupting the opponent's game plan, the deck looks to control the board and outpace the opponent's development. By utilizing a mix of disruptive spells and powerful creatures, the deck seeks to quickly close out games before the opponent can stabilize. With a mix of removal spells, card advantage engines, and powerful finishers, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a relentless onslaught of threats.

This deck focuses on utilizing the Amulet of Vigor to untap lands and generate mana quickly, allowing for explosive plays with Primeval Titan and Scapeshift to quickly assemble a powerful board state. The deck also includes utility lands like Urza's Saga and Boseiju, Who Endures to further enhance the combo potential, while also utilizing cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Lotus Field to provide additional consistency and resources. Additionally, cards like Spelunking and Malevolent Rumble help provide disruption and protection for the combo pieces, ensuring the deck can execute its game plan effectively.

This deck focuses on assembling the Allosaurus Combo by utilizing cards like Neoform and Eldritch Evolution to quickly bring out Allosaurus Rider and then use its ability to summon Ghalta or Griselbrand for a powerful finish. The deck also includes cards like Pact of Negation for protection and Consign to Memory for control. The goal is to ramp up mana quickly, search for key combo pieces, and disrupt the opponent's strategy while setting up for a game-winning combo.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures and disrupting the opponent's game plan, while also controlling the board with removal spells and tempo plays. It aims to pressure the opponent quickly with creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phage, Titan of Fire's Fury, while also utilizing cards like Consign to Memory and Quantum Riddler to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Teferi, Time Raveler provides additional disruption and protection, while cards like Solitude and Prismatic Ending help deal with threats on the opponent's side of the field. The deck aims to control the game and close it out quickly with its aggressive creatures.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays and direct damage spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer, supported by cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls. The inclusion of Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge provides additional reach and removal options. The deck aims to maintain board presence, deal consistent damage, and finish off opponents with powerful finishers like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker. The deck also includes utility cards like Thraben Charm and Ranger-Captain of Eos to control the battlefield.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, then using cards like Goryo's Vengeance to cheat them into play. Instant speed spells like Ephemerate and Thoughtseize help control the game while setting up the combo. Force of Negation provides protection while Teferi, Time Raveler can disrupt opponents' strategies. The deck utilizes a mix of cards to quickly reanimate threats, disrupt opponents, and maintain card advantage, aiming to overwhelm opponents with powerful creatures and control elements.

The deck focuses on using Amulet of Vigor to generate extra mana and utilize powerful lands like Gruul Turf and Simic Growth Chamber to ramp up quickly. Primeval Titan is key in fetching specific lands and setting up the combo to win with cards like Scapeshift or Urza's Saga. The deck also includes toolbox options like Green Sun's Zenith for flexibility and resilience. The goal is to assemble the right combination of lands and threats to overwhelm the opponent in a single, decisive turn.
